description: Funded research projects (ANR, EU, etc.) with budget and partners. One document is one project.

acronym.description: The acronym of the project in multiple languages.

action.description: The action associated with the project.

budgetFinanced.description: The financed budget of the project.

budgetTotal.description: The total budget of the project.

call.description: Details of the call associated with the project.

description.description: The description of the project in multiple languages.

label.description: The label of the domain in multiple languages.

endDate.description: The end date of the project.

id.description: The unique identifier of the project.

keywords.description: Keywords related to the project in multiple languages.

label.description: The label of the project in multiple languages.

participants.description: Details of the participants involved in the project.

startDate.description: The start date of the project.
